timestream.database.DatabaseName.Docs: The name of the Timestream database.
timestream.database.DatabaseName.Length Constraints: Minimum length of 3 bytes\. Maximum length of 256 bytes\.

timestream.database.KmsKeyId.Docs: The identifier of the AWS KMS key used to encrypt the data stored in the database.

timestream.database.Tags.Docs: The tags to add to the database.
